scripts.prepare:webpush: npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush ci --no-audit --no-fund || npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush install --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run dev
scripts.dev:utm: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run dev:utm
scripts.build: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run build
scripts.build:utm: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run build:utm
scripts.preview: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run preview
scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run deploy
scripts.worker:dev: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run worker:dev
scripts.worker:dev:utm: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run worker:dev:utm
scripts.worker:deploy: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run worker:deploy
scripts.worker:deploy:utm: npm run prepare:webpush && npm --prefix web_share_subset/webpush run worker:deploy:utm
